sp_widget.description: Business Units and team member management with hierarchical view
sp_widget.name: Organization Management
sp_widget.template:
Organization

Manage business units, teams, and reporting hierarchies

Business Units
{{c.data.topUnits}}
Top-Level Units
Managers
{{c.data.teams}}
Total Managers
Team Members
{{c.data.members.length}}
Total Headcount
Org Depth
{{c.data.depth}}
Hierarchy Levels
Organization Structure
Click on any unit to view details

{{unit.desc}}
{{unit.manager}} {{unit.memberCount || 0}} member{{unit.memberCount !== 1 ? 's' : ''}}

{{sub.desc}}

{{gsub.desc}}

business unit

{{c.selectedUnit.manager.substring(0,2).toUpperCase()}}

Create a new business unit in your organization
Add Team Member
Add Team Member
Add a new team member to your organization. Fields marked * are mandatory.
